title: Kaiser (Research Version)
description: 6×3min @120% FTP / 3min rest — 18 total minutes at 120%. Completing Kaiser is a VO2max milestone.
purpose: Extended Spencer for max VO2 volume

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 70%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 6 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 3:00 at 120-120% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/6. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/6. 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. Duration: 3:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/6. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2/6. 120%, 95-100 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 35% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 47% done. 0 intervals left. 25 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 120% for 3:00. Next up: 3:00 recovery, then 3min at 120%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 58% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 19min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 31 minutes of work done. 19 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 19min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 3:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/6. You're 64% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% through session. Rep 5/6. You've done 12min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34 minutes of work done. 16 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 1 intervals left. 16 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 13 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
